summary: Grom Zone Messaging feature testing complete. All features verified: (1) Grom Zone folder tab visible ONLY for Grom users in Messages page. (2) Grom-to-Grom messaging works via /api/messages/send. (3) Groms cannot message non-Groms (blocked by backend with 403). (4) Non-Groms cannot access Grom Zone endpoints (403). (5) Parent toggle 'can_message_grom_channel' (Grom Zone Chat) present in GromManage.js Controls tab. (6) /api/messages/grom-zone/available-groms returns only approved linked Groms. (7) /api/messages/conversations with grom_zone=true filters correctly. (8) /api/messages/unread-counts returns grom_zone count. Backend: 11/12 tests passed (1 skipped). Frontend: All UI flows verified.

minor.issue: Parent access test skipped - testgromparent may not be linked to testgrom4

critical_code_review_comments: messages.py check_grom_messaging_permission() correctly handles Grom Zone access with is_grom_channel flag
messages.py check_grom_to_grom_only() correctly blocks Grom-to-non-Grom and non-Grom-to-Grom messaging
messages.py get_conversations() correctly filters with grom_zone=true parameter
messages.py get_unread_counts() returns separate grom_zone count
messages.py get_available_groms_to_message() returns only linked/approved Groms with can_message_grom_channel enabled
MessagesPage.js getFolders() correctly shows Grom Zone tab only for Grom users (isGrom check)
MessagesPage.js fetchConversations() correctly passes grom_zone=true for Grom Zone folder
GromManage.js Controls tab includes 'Grom Zone Chat' toggle with key 'can_message_grom_channel'
auth.py ProfileResponse includes parent_id, parent_link_approved, parental_controls for GromSafetyGate
context_for_next_testing_agent: Grom Zone Messaging feature fully verified: (1) Grom Zone folder tab appears first in Messages page for Grom users with 🏄‍♂️ emoji. (2) Grom-to-Grom messaging works - test message sent from testgrom4 to DAvid grom. (3) Backend correctly blocks Grom-to-non-Grom messaging with 403 'Groms can only message other Groms in the Grom Zone'. (4) Backend correctly blocks non-Grom-to-Grom messaging with 403 'Cannot send messages to Grom accounts'. (5) Unlinked Groms blocked from Grom Zone with 403. (6) GromManage Controls tab shows 'Grom Zone Chat' toggle (can_message_grom_channel). (7) Non-Grom users (Grom Parent) see The Channel, Primary, Requests folders but NOT Grom Zone.

features_verified.grom_zone_folder_hidden_for_non_grom: VERIFIED - Grom Parent sees The Channel, Primary, Requests but NOT Grom Zone
features_verified.grom_to_grom_messaging: VERIFIED - Message sent from testgrom4 to DAvid grom successfully
features_verified.grom_cannot_message_non_grom: VERIFIED - API returns 403 'Groms can only message other Groms'
features_verified.non_grom_cannot_message_grom: VERIFIED - API returns 403 'Cannot send messages to Grom accounts'
features_verified.non_grom_cannot_access_grom_zone_endpoin: VERIFIED - API returns 403 'Only Groms can access Grom Zone'
features_verified.unlinked_grom_blocked: VERIFIED - API returns 403 for unlinked Grom
features_verified.available_groms_endpoint: VERIFIED - Returns list of linked/approved Groms
features_verified.parent_grom_zone_chat_toggle: VERIFIED - 'Grom Zone Chat' toggle in GromManage Controls tab
